name: Agnar the Unwavering
bio:
Physical Appearance: Nord male. Wears a full set of fur armor and wields a silver war axe. Also carries a shirt with suspenders and a pair of blue suede shoes.
Race: Nord
Personality Keywords: determined, unwavering, devoted, fearless
Role: Agnar the Unwavering was the Chieftain of Thirsk and husband to Svenja Snow-Song. He and Svenja left Thirsk to track down the fearsome Uderfrykte Matron, mother of the Udyrfrykte that had previously attacked the mead hall.
The Hunt: Agnar and Svenja's search for the Uderfrykte Matron led them to Cyrodiil, having heard of a creature living near Dive Rock. He kept a journal describing their quest in detail.
author: Bethesda
